mechanism_narrative: Increases in FEDFUNDS raise the discount rate applied to future earnings and tighten financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the short-rate trend is upward.
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month FEDFUNDS changes do not have lower subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with nonpositive changes, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is above -0.03 in absolute failure direction.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of UNRATE below 4.5 percent signals tight labor markets and durable household income, supporting consumption-linked earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with contained policy rates
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations with UNRATE below 4.5% produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of cases or have mean returns not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS rise together, stronger spending is backed by job creation rather than credit-only demand, lifting near-term revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and PAYEMS both cross above their respective 6-month moving averages
failure_condition: Reject if joint positive RSAFS and PAYEMS triggers fail to outperform single-series triggers by at least 25 basis points in average 20-day forward S&P 500 returns over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation pressure rises while FEDFUNDS remains low, investors price a higher probability of future tightening and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 6-month annualized CPIAUCSL growth crosses more than 2 percentage points above FEDFUNDS
regime_hint: inflation-upside risk during low nominal policy rates
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-policy-gap episodes have nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the interaction term between CPIAUCSL growth and FEDFUNDS is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A deterioration in INDPRO signals weakening production volumes and operating leverage, reducing expected cyclical earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside-crossing episodes are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed unconditional 60-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: A HOUST crossing below 1200 thousand units signals weakening housing demand and softer construction-linked activity, reducing forward earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below-1200 crossing episodes do not precede lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations, or if the triggered hit rate for negative returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDPC1 trend represents broad real demand growth that supports aggregate revenues and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days when real output momentum is positive.
failure_condition: Reject if positive quarter-over-quarter GDPC1 growth observations fail to produce higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative growth observations after accounting for publication lag.

mechanism_narrative: Low UNRATE combined with rising FEDFUNDS signals late-cycle overheating and policy restraint, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days around macro repricing windows.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 4.5% and FEDFUNDS crosses above its 3-month moving average
regime_hint: late-cycle monetary tightening with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE and rising-FEDFUNDS trigger does not generate lower 5-day S&P 500 returns than either condition alone, or if triggered average returns are positive in rolling 2-year tests.
